summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of MediTrack pill counting system updates. All core functionality verified: pills_per_dose successfully moved from Medicine to Schedule model with pills_whole and pills_half fields.

fixed_bugs.issue: MedicineResponse model expected integer stock_count but got float after taking fractional pills
fixed_bugs.fix_applied: Updated MedicineResponse and MedicineUpdate models to use float for stock_count field
fixed_bugs.validation: Fixed and verified - stock reduction and restoration now work correctly with fractional amounts

passed_tests: Schedule creation with pills_whole and pills_half fields
Medicine status calculation based on schedule entries
Take medicine stock reduction by correct pills_per_dose from schedule
Undo medicine restoration of correct amount
Schedule display shows pill dose information correctly
